ddls:
CREATE TABLE "dogs" (
  "dog_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each dog */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who registered the dog */,
  "avg_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the dog */,
  "num_ratings" INTEGER /* Number of ratings received by the dog */,
  "breed_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the breed of the dog */,
  "breed_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the breed group of the dog */,
  "breed_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the breed type of the dog */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the dog */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the dog */,
  "spayed_neutered" INTEGER /* Whether the dog is spayed or neutered */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the dog's personality and behavior */,
  "location" TEXT /* The current location of the dog (e.g., shelter, foster home) */,
  "adoption_status" TEXT /* The current adoption status of the dog (e.g., available, pending, adopted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dog_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dogs_breed_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("breed_group_id") REFERENCES breed_groups ("breed_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dogs_breed_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("breed_type_id") REFERENCES breed_types ("breed_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dogs_breed_id FOREIGN KEY ("breed_id") REFERENCES breeds ("breed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dogs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., adopter, shelter staff, admin) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "about_me" TEXT /* A brief description about the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "breeds" (
  "breed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each breed */,
  "breed_name" TEXT /* Name of the breed */,
  "breed_description" TEXT /* Description of the breed */,
  "average_lifespan" INTEGER /* Average lifespan of the breed in years */,
  "common_ailments" TEXT /* Common health issues associated with the breed */,
  "activity_level" TEXT /* Activity level of the breed (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("breed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "breed_groups" (
  "breed_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each breed group */,
  "breed_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the breed group */,
  "breed_group_description" TEXT /* Description of the breed group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("breed_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "breed_types" (
  "breed_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each breed type */,
  "breed_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the breed type */,
  "breed_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the breed type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("breed_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "dog_id" TEXT /* ID of the dog being rated */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user giving the rating */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating value (1-10) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date and time the rating was given */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the user */,
  "rating_type" TEXT /* Type of rating (e.g., behavior, health, appearance) */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Whether the rating is anonymous */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_dog_id FOREIGN KEY ("dog_id") REFERENCES dogs ("dog_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dog_photos" (
  "photo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each photo */,
  "dog_id" TEXT /* ID of the dog the photo belongs to */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the photo */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the photo was uploaded */,
  "photo_caption" TEXT /* A caption for the photo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("photo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dog_photos_dog_id FOREIGN KEY ("dog_id") REFERENCES dogs ("dog_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dog_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "dog_id" TEXT /* ID of the dog the history entry belongs to */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., adoption, medical check-up) */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user involved in the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* The location where the event occurred */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL of a photo related to the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dog_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dog_history_dog_id FOREIGN KEY ("dog_id") REFERENCES dogs ("dog_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "preferred_breeds" TEXT /* A list of preferred dog breeds */,
  "adoption_history" TEXT /* A brief history of the user's previous adoptions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_favorites" (
  "favorite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each favorite entry */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user marking the dog as a favorite */,
  "dog_id" TEXT /* ID of the dog being marked as a favorite */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the dog was marked as a favorite */,
  "reason" TEXT /* The reason the user marked the dog as a favorite */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("favorite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_favorites_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_favorites_dog_id FOREIGN KEY ("dog_id") REFERENCES dogs ("dog_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dog_adoption" (
  "adoption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each adoption */,
  "dog_id" TEXT /* ID of the dog being adopted */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user adopting the dog */,
  "adoption_date" TEXT /* Date of the adoption */,
  "adopter_notes" TEXT /* Notes provided by the adopter */,
  "adoption_reason" TEXT /* The reason the user adopted the dog */,
  "adoption_fee" TEXT /* The adoption fee paid by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adoption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dog_adoption_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dog_adoption_dog_id FOREIGN KEY ("dog_id") REFERENCES dogs ("dog_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dog_medical_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical record */,
  "dog_id" TEXT /* ID of the dog the record belongs to */,
  "medical_condition" TEXT /* Medical condition of the dog */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date of diagnosis */,
  "treatment_notes" TEXT /* Notes on the treatment provided */,
  "veterinarian_id" INTEGER /* ID of the veterinarian who treated the dog */,
  "next_appointment_date" TEXT /* The date of the next scheduled medical appointment */,
  "vaccination_status" TEXT /* The vaccination status of the dog (e.g., up-to-date, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dog_medical_records_dog_id FOREIGN KEY ("dog_id") REFERENCES dogs ("dog_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dog_medical_records_veterinarian_id FOREIGN KEY ("veterinarian_id") REFERENCES veterinarians ("veterinarian_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "veterinarians" (
  "veterinarian_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each veterinarian */,
  "veterinarian_name" TEXT /* Name of the veterinarian */,
  "veterinarian_email" TEXT /* Email address of the veterinarian */,
  "veterinarian_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the veterinarian */,
  "veterinarian_address" TEXT /* Address of the veterinarian's clinic */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* The specialization of the veterinarian (e.g., Pediatrics, Surgery) */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* The URL of the veterinarian's clinic website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("veterinarian_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "adoption_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each adoption request */,
  "dog_id" TEXT /* ID of the dog the request is for */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user making the request */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the request was made */,
  "request_status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, approved, declined) */,
  "review_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the review process */,
  "interview_date" TEXT /* The date of the adoption interview */,
  "interview_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the adoption interview */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adoption_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adoption_requests_dog_id FOREIGN KEY ("dog_id") REFERENCES dogs ("dog_id")
)
